cases.prompt: Generate a product listing page. Layout: store. Left sidebar with facet filters (Category, Brand). Main area: sort dropdown and product grid. Use collection.facetGroups for filters, collection.products for grid. initActions: fetchNavCollections, fetchCart, fetchCollection. Use $ref fragments/product-card for each product. Empty state when no products.

Generate a sign-in screen. Form with email and password fields. state.form with username, password. state.errors for validation. submitAction: validate then loginMutation. Use layout store. Center the form card. Heading Sign In, subtext. Button Sign In.

Generate a cart page. Layout store. initActions: fetchNavCollections, fetchCart. Empty state when cart.totalQuantity is 0: show Your Cart is Empty, Continue Shopping button. When cart has items: show cart.lines in a list with image, name, price, quantity, remove. Subtotal with formatCurrency. View Cart and Checkout buttons.
